title: westringia blakeana
intro: Westringia blakeana, also known as the Westringia or Coastal Rosemary, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Westringia blakeana include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate respiratory problems. Westringia blakeana can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and valuable herb in natural medicine.
